instruction: Create an iOS26 SwiftUI view using the new FocusSession API to start a focus timer.
Show how to use the new iPadOS26 MultiWindow API to open two documents side by side.
Create a macOS26 SwiftUI view using the new MenuBarExtra API to show battery status.
Show how to use the new WatchOS26 InteractiveComplication API to create a tappable hydration tracker.
Create a TVOS26 SwiftUI view using the new FocusedContent API to highlight a selected episode.
Create a VisionOS26 SwiftUI view using the new ImmersiveSpace API to present a virtual workspace.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of Bool values to @Observable for iOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published struct containing a Color property to @Observable for macOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published array of String values to @Observable for watchOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published set of UUIDs to @Observable for tvOS26.
Refactor an ObservableObject with a published optional Double property to @Observable for visionOS26.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iOS26 that displays a favorite beverage, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iPadOS26 that displays a favorite movie, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for macOS26 that displays a disk usage percentage, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for watchOS26 that displays a sleep score, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for tvOS26 that displays a favorite director, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for visionOS26 that displays a virtual object count, configurable via AppIntent.
Create an iOS26 SwiftUI view using the new AppShortcuts API to add a custom shortcut.
Show how to use the new iPadOS26 SplitView API to create a three-column layout.
Create a macOS26 SwiftUI view using the new NotificationBanner API to show a banner.
Show how to use the new WatchOS26 SleepTracking API to display sleep quality.
Create a TVOS26 SwiftUI view using the new RemoteControl API to show remote status.
Create a VisionOS26 SwiftUI view using the new EyeTracking API to show gaze coordinates.

Refactor an ObservableObject with a published optional Int property to @Observable for visionOS26.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iOS26 that displays a daily step goal, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for iPadOS26 that displays a favorite recipe, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for macOS26 that displays a CPU usage percentage, configurable via AppIntent.
Create a WidgetKit widget for watchOS26 that displays a timer, configurable via AppIntent.
